Jennifer L. Bartlett of SIMON GREENSTONE PANATIER BARTLETT, P.C. (562-590-3400), appearing via CourtCall for plaintiffs / opposing parties Pauline Uhr, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT CALAVERAS ASBESTOS, LTD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, SUMMARY ADJUDICATION

Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Calaveras Asbestos, Ltd.'s motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant sustained its initial burden under both prongs of Aguilar. Defendant sustained its burden of demonstrating that plaintiffs do not possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that Mr. Uhr was exposed to raw asbestos or asbestos-containing products or materials attributable to defendant. Defendant also sustained its burden of negating an essential element of plaintiffs' claim by demonstrating that plaintiffs' exposure allegations pre-date defendant's ownership and operation of its mine and sale of raw asbestos. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
